accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.loading: Loading accounts from the local database...
accounts.emptyState: No accounts match the visible non-primary filter yet. If you have not selected a DB file, open Settings and bind your OneDrive database.

transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.emptyStatus: No transfers found for this month.
transfers.emptyBox: There are no transfers recorded for this month.

save.localSave: Saving transfer locally and preparing the database upload...
save.uploadFailed: Uploading the database to OneDrive failed. Your transfer data is still here.
save.localFailed: Saving the transfer locally failed. Nothing was uploaded.
save.uploadFailedToast: Upload failed. Retry when the connection is stable.
save.retryFailedToast: Retry failed. The transfer data is still preserved.
save.localFailedToast: Transfer could not be saved locally.
save.conflictToast: OneDrive changed before upload completed. Refresh before trying again.

validation.nameLength: Description must be longer than 2 characters.
validation.differentAccounts: Source and destination accounts must be different.
validation.fromNotSpendings: Cannot transfer from the PRIMARY SPENDINGS account.
validation.toNotIncome: Cannot transfer to the PRIMARY INCOME account.
validation.incomeToSpendingsInvalid: Direct transfer from PRIMARY INCOME to PRIMARY SPENDINGS is not allowed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Authentication controls for OneDrive account access.

status.signInRequired: Sign in to browse and choose a .db file.
status.choose: Choose a .db file from the current OneDrive folder.

browser.empty: No folders or .db files found here.

reset.title: Reset local app data?
reset.description: This clears local DB file binding and cached app data on this device for the signed-in account.

startup.toastSyncing: Syncing with OneDrive in the background...
startup.onlineUnchanged: Cached DB is current with OneDrive.
startup.onlineChanged: Downloaded the latest DB from OneDrive.
startup.offlineCached: Offline mode using the last cached DB.
startup.cachedFallback: Using the last cached DB because refreshing from OneDrive failed.
startup.cachedFallbackPrefix: {message} Using the last cached DB for now.
startup.failedUnexpected: Startup sync failed unexpectedly. Check the browser console and retry.

dbRuntimeError.initFailed: Failed to initialize the local SQLite runtime. Reload the app and try syncing again.
dbRuntimeError.openFailed: Failed to open the cached OneDrive database snapshot. Re-sync from settings and try again.
dbRuntimeError.pragmaFailed: The downloaded OneDrive database could not be prepared for safe reads. Re-sync and try again.
dbRuntimeError.notOpen: No open local database is available yet. Run startup sync again to load the snapshot.
dbRuntimeError.queryFailed: The local SQLite database query failed unexpectedly.
dbRuntimeError.exportFailed: Failed to export local SQLite bytes.
dbRuntimeError.fallback: Failed to open the local SQLite database snapshot. Retry sync from settings.
